title: Guyititian Nuvio Starter Build
creator: Guyititian
languageNotes: Folder titles, setup notes, and build description are written in English.
description: A Nuvio-ready starter build with collection artwork previews, folder organization, catalog source references, and a matching AIOMetadata catalog export.
importStyle: Nuvio collections JSON + AIOMetadata catalog export
setupNotes: Import the AIOMetadata catalog export first.
Then import or recreate the Nuvio collections.
Review catalog mappings inside Nuvio after import, especially if your AIOMetadata instance or addon ID differs from the creator setup.
Artwork is loaded from the URLs included in the Nuvio collections JSON.
knownIssues: Some catalog IDs may be instance-specific.
Some artwork may be hosted externally and depends on the original host remaining available.
Per-collection downloads, trimmed catalog exports, and mix-and-match builds are planned for later.
